positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a wandering astronaut overlooking a vibrant nebula, rendered in a clean, bold silhouette style. The astronaut is posed contemplating the cosmos, arms outstretched slightly. The nebula features swirling cosmic gas in deep indigo, electric cyan, and magenta, contrasting sharply against a deep black void. Use high contrast, graphic novel inking techniques, and luminous bioluminescence effects on the cosmic elements. Composition must be perfectly centered, designed for maximum visual impact on fabric. Flat vector graphic quality with depth and dramatic lighting. Cinematic, pop art, space exploration theme.
